- Changed white block at cols 6-13 to gray

So the pattern seems to be:
- Clicking blue block at cols 12-13: toggles the block to its right (cols 18-23)
- Clicking blue block at cols 16-17: toggles the block to its left (cols 6-13)
Wait, but the green marker area also changes. Let me look at this more carefully. The green marker (N) at row 41, cols 14-15 is on bar 1. The green marker (N) at row 53, cols 8-10 is in the white block area left of bar 1.

- The green marker area at rows 49-53, cols 8-10 changed again

Now, the goal might be to turn all white blocks gray. Currently:
- White blocks: cols 6-13 (now gray after 2nd click), 28-35, 38-45, 50-57
- Gray block: cols 18-23 (back to white after 2nd click)

Hmm, but the blue blocks are at cols 12-13, 16-17, 24-25, 28-29, 34-35, 38-39, 46-47, 50-51. That's 8 blue blocks.
Looking at the layout:
